queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 8 OFFSET 4

expected.note: LIMIT 8 OFFSET 4 — skips first 4 rows in DESC throughput order

queries.sql: SELECT sorter_model, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY sorter_model, operation_mode ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 6 OFFSET 2

expected.note: GROUP BY with LIMIT/OFFSET pagination on aggregates

queries.sql: WITH numbered AS (SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS row_num FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, row_num FROM numbered WHERE row_num BETWEEN 5 AND 10 ORDER BY row_num

expected.note: CTE with ROW_NUMBER for pagination; rows 5-10

queries.sql: WITH reference AS (SELECT _timestamp FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5) SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE _timestamp > (SELECT _timestamp FROM reference) ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 8

expected.note: Keyset pagination using subquery with OFFSET as reference

queries.sql: WITH page AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, control_center, load_factor, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, _timestamp ASC) AS row_idx FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM page WHERE row_idx > 6 AND row_idx <= 14 ORDER BY row_idx ASC

SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode ORDER BY cnt DESC, avg_tput DESC LIMIT 6 OFFSET 3

expected.note: GROUP BY with LIMIT/OFFSET pagination on aggregated results

queries.sql: WITH zoned AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM zoned WHERE rn BETWEEN 2 AND 4 ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, rn ASC

expected.note: Per-partition pagination: rows 2-4 within each facility_zone by throughput

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, conveyor_lane, load_factor, charge_remaining FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL ORDER BY load_factor DESC, charge_remaining ASC LIMIT 7 OFFSET 7

expected.note: Second page (OFFSET 7, LIMIT 7) with dual ORDER BY

queries.sql: WITH inner_page AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cell_temp DESC) AS temp_rank FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM inner_page WHERE temp_rank <= 8 UNION ALL SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cell_temp ASC) AS temp_rank FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL ORDER BY temp_rank ASC LIMIT 16

expected.note: Top-8 hottest + coldest via UNION of two RANK windows with LIMIT 16

queries.sql: WITH dense_ranked AS (SELECT *, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS dr FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL), distinct_page AS (SELECT MIN(_timestamp) AS _timestamp, throughput_rate, dr FROM dense_ranked GROUP BY throughput_rate, dr) SELECT * FROM distinct_page WHERE dr > 3 AND dr <= 8 ORDER BY dr ASC

expected.note: DENSE_RANK pagination: pages by distinct throughput tiers (dr 4-8)
